pre_animation: variable.hand_bob = query.life_time < 0.01 ? 0.0 : variable.hand_bob + ((query.is_on_ground && query.is_alive ? math.clamp(math.sqrt(math.pow(query.position_delta(0), 2.0) + math.pow(query.position_delta(2), 2.0)), 0.0, 0.1) : 0.0) - variable.hand_bob) * 0.02;

variable.ubgl = q.property('aks74:gp25') == 1 || q.property('aks74:gp25') == 3 || q.property('ak74:gp25') == 1 || q.property('ak74:gp25') == 3 || q.property('ak74m:gp25') == 1 || q.property('ak74m:gp25') == 3 || q.property('ak74m_zenit:gp25') == 1 || q.property('ak74m_zenit:gp25') == 3 || q.property('akms:gp25') == 1 || q.property('skms:gp25') == 3 || q.property('ak12:gp25') == 1 || q.property('ak12:gp25') == 3 || q.property('m4a1:m203') == 1 || q.property('m4a1:m203') == 3 || q.property('m16a1:m203') == 1 || q.property('m16a1:m203') == 3 || q.property('m16a2:m203') == 1 || q.property('m16a2:m203') == 3 || q.property('m16a4:m203') == 1 || q.property('m16a4:m203') == 3;

animate.mosin_controller: variable.is_first_person && q.is_riding  && q.property('addon:gun') == 2 || variable.is_first_person && q.is_riding && q.property('addon:gun') == 3 || variable.is_first_person && q.is_riding && q.property('addon:gun') == 5
